item.name: False Scad
item.description:
A common saltwater fish doing its best scad impression.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: A scad or not a scad? That is the question that confronts scholars who ponder the nomenclature of this undefinable fish, a pioneering maverick that defiantly straddles taxonomical lines and chooses to live beyond labels.
